alt: Secretarybird standing alert with its quill-like crest feathers elegantly arrayed
caption: Their common name is widely believed to originate from the long black crest feathers, which resemble the quill pens 19th-century clerks tucked behind their ears.
acquisitionNotes: Curated fun-fact profile showcasing the classic quill-like crest posture. Local WebP ingested from https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/e/e7/Secretario_%28Sagittarius_serpentarius%29%2C_parque_nacional_de_Amboseli%2C_Kenia%2C_2024-05-23%2C_DD_13.jpg
